items.text: numberServicesTrue counts the number of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.fragment: numberServicesTrue counts the number of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.requirement_fragment: numberServicesTrue counts the number of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS

items.text: if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision, then outDec = ACAS
items.fragment: if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision, then outDec = ACAS
items.requirement_fragment: if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision, then outDec = ACAS

items.text: if not (inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision), then outDec = GCAS
items.fragment: if not (inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision), then outDec = GCAS
items.requirement_fragment: if not (inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) is sufficient to prevent a secondary collision), then outDec = GCAS

items.text: if numberServicesTrue >= 2, then outDec = dynamic decision result
items.fragment: if numberServicesTrue >= 2, then outDec = dynamic decision result
items.requirement_fragment: if numberServicesTrue >= 2, then outDec = dynamic decision result

items.text: if numberServicesTrue < 2, then outDec = static priority-based value

items.requirement_fragment: if numberServicesTrue < 2, then outDec = static priority-based value
